health_conditions: HSV1 (lifelong fever blisters, ~6/year prior to treatment)

benefits.description: Lifelong fever blisters (~6/year) stopped after starting Na-selank nasal spray; only one outbreak in the ~12 years since starting, which occurred when they temporarily ran out

protocol_notes: User started with 'tufsin analog selank (nasal)' about a dozen years ago and has been taking Na-selank for the better part of a decade. Originally described compound as 'tufsin analog selank' in first mention.
